name: Pheasant with Roasted Garlic & Lemon
recipeIngredient: Chicken stock or low-sodium chicken broth (2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Heat olive oil in a 12-inch oven-proof skillet over high heat on top of the stove.
3. Add peeled garlic cloves and sauté until skins are medium golden.
4. If garlic turns black, remove it from the skillet.
5. Add pheasant and brown both sides.
6. When pheasant is browned, return the garlic to the skillet.
7. Without removing fat, add broth and lemon juice.
8. Sprinkle with salt and bring mixture to a boil.
9. Place skillet uncovered in oven for 50 minutes, turning once.
10. To make candied lemon zest: Strip lemon zest into 1/4-inch strips, place in saucepan with sugar and water. Bring to boil over medium heat, simmer until zests are shiny and translucent, strain and discard syrup.
11. Return skillet to stove top, add whipping cream and reduce until glossy.
12. Arrange pheasant on serving platter, drizzle garlic and glaze, garnish with candied zest. Serve immediately.
